title: Add fix_gofmt target
body:
fix_gofmt will run gofmt -s -w on files that need to be
formatted.  Useful for developers prior to checking code
in.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, nice change @baude.  Tests are failing due to registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora being unreachable (again!). Anyone know what's going on with that?

:pushpin: Commit 0d66e90 has been approved by `baude`
